name: Summer Italian Stuffed Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 small Head radicchio, torn into bite-size pieces
1 small Bunch watercress, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. On a hard surface, pound the chicken to 1/4 inch thickness using a meat mallet or similar flattening utensil. Place in a large baking pan.
2. Add 1/2 cup of oil-vinegar dressing and turn to coat. Cover and refrigerate.
3. In a medium bowl, place radicchio and watercress. Add the remaining 1/3 cup of oil-vinegar dressing and toss to mix. Arrange mixture on a platter and refrigerate.
4. Remove chicken from oil-vinegar dressing; drain.
5. Cut each chicken breast in half crosswise.
6. Place an even portion of basil and tomatoes on each of the four pieces of chicken.
7. Top each piece of chicken with the remaining half of the breast.
8. In a shallow dish, beat water and egg.
9. On a plate, mix bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese.
10. Dip chicken one piece at a time in the egg mixture, then in the bread crumb mixture.
11. In a large frying pan, heat oil over medium-high temperature.
12. Add chicken and cook about 10 minutes or until chicken is brown and a fork can be inserted with ease.
13. Arrange chicken on top of radicchio mixture.
14. Garnish with tomato rosettes.
15. Serves 4.
